zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de Totnes於1084年出生在英國戴文時，她的父親Judhael de Totnes35歲，母親Bertha de Picquigny30歲。她於1104年與Philip de Braose在英國素可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1153年在英國奧可福爾貝可利享年69歲，埋葬在英國戴文巴恩斯塔普爾 聖 瑪麗 抹大拉的。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de Totnes于1084年出生在英国戴文时，她的父亲Judhael de Totnes35岁，母亲Bertha de Picquigny30岁。她于1104年与Philip de Braose在英国素可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1153年在英国奧可福爾貝可利享年69岁，埋葬在英国戴文巴恩斯塔普爾 聖 瑪麗 抹大拉的。

nameMeanings.name: Totnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Towns
meanings: English (northern): variant of Town , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de Totnes was born in 1084, in Devon, England, her father, Judhael de Totnes, was 35 and her mother, Bertha de Picquigny, was 30. She married Philip de Braose in 1104, in Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1153, in Beckley, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Barnstaple St Mary Magdalene, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor de Totnes est née en 1084, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Judhael de Totnes, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Bertha de Picquigny, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Philip de Braose en 1104, à Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1153, à Beckley, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Barnstaple St Mary Magdalene, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor de Totnes 1084 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Judhael de Totnes 35 und ihre Mutter Bertha de Picquigny 30. Sie hat 1104 in Sussex, England Philip de Braose geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1153 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Beckley, Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Barnstaple St Mary Magdalene, Devon, England begraben.

Lei sposato Philip de Braose nel 1104, nel Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Totnesが1084年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Judhael de Totnesは35歳，母Bertha de Picquignyは30歳であった。1104年にイギリススセックスでPhilip de Braoseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1153年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアベックリーで69歳で死去し，イギリスデボンバーンスタプル スト マリー マグダリーンにて埋葬された。

ko.St Peter & St Mary Magdalene, Barnstaple: 영국 데폰 바른스타플 스트 메리 막달레나
ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Totnes(이)가 1084년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Judhael de Totnes(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bertha de Picquigny(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1104년 영국 수세스에서 Philip de Braose(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1153년 영국 스퍼드실르 벡리에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 바른스타플 스트 메리 막달레나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Totnes nasceu em 1084, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Judhael de Totnes, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Bertha de Picquigny, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Philip de Braose em 1104, em Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1153, em Beckley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Barnstaple St Mary Magdalene, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.St Peter & St Mary Magdalene, Barnstaple: барнстапл ст мэри магдеилин, девон, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de Totnes родилась в 1084 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Judhael de Totnes было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Bertha de Picquigny, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philip de Braose в 1104 г. в местности суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1153 г. в местности беккли, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности барнстапл ст мэри магдеилин, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor de Totnes nació en 1084, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Judhael de Totnes, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Bertha de Picquigny, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Philip de Braose en 1104, en Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1153, en Beckley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Barnstaple St Mary Magdalene, Devon, Inglaterra.
